title: elytrigia pertenuis
intro: Elytrigia pertenuis, also known as Elymus arenarius or sea barley, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Elytrigia pertenuis include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Elytrigia pertenuis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
